Description


Elevate athletic recovery with **STEMREGEN® Sport**, professionally formulated for athletes. STEMREGEN® SPORT is a blend of clinically tested natural ingredients that boost stem cell release and migration, supporting healthy tissue repair and renewal to help boost post-workout recovery and enhance vitality.


Featured Review


### Marques J.

Verified Buyer

## Never too late

“I can still dunk at 65.”


Frequently Asked Questions


**Who is STEMREGEN® Sport designed for?**

STEMREGEN® Sport is designed for professional athletes, endurance athletes, and strength athletes that want to recover faster build more resilient tissues while remaining WADA compliant viaNSF Certified for Sport stem cell support.

**How does STEMREGEN® Sport support athletic recovery?**

Sport increases the number of circulating stem cells and supports their migration into tissues, while the blend of pterostilbene and notoginseng further supports muscle recovery after strenuous physical activity.

**Why does stem cell support matter for athletes and active individuals?**

Intense training places elevated demands on the body's tissues, and by supporting the innate repair system with more circulating stem cells, STEMREGEN® Sport helps athletes recover faster, build resilience while at rest, and continue to perform at elite levels.

**What makes STEMREGEN® Sport different from STEMREGEN® Release?**

Sport is professionally formulated for athletes with NSF Certified for Sport certification, plus added pterostilbene to further support muscle recovery, an uncommon combination amongst other stem cell supplements.


Shipping


We will work quickly to ship your order as soon as possible. Once your order has shipped, you will receive an email with further information. Delivery times vary depending on your location.

![Close-up of a metallic object with reflective surfaces](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/sport-feature-1-release.webp?v=1771519700&width=3840)

![Enhanced Repair Icon](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/Enhanced_Repair.svg?v=1770311247&width=3840)

## Stem Cell Release

**STEMREGEN® Sport** was specifically formulated for its effect on stem cells, with ingredients scientifically documented to support their release from the bone marrow.

Increased circulating stem cells help strengthen the body’s repair response, supporting post-exercise recovery and performance vitality.

![Athlete silhouette on a dark background](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/sport-feature-2-recovery.webp?v=1771519700&width=3840)

![Rapid Recovery Icon](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/Rapid_Recovery.svg?v=1770311247&width=3840)

## Professionally Formulated for Athletes for Enhanced Recovery

This proprietary formula supports stem cell availability and their migration into tissues, promoting efficient repair and recovery after intense training.

**STEMREGEN® Sport** also includes pterostilbene and notoginseng to further support muscle recovery, resilience, and endurance.

![Pattern of NSF Certified Sport logos on a dark background](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/sport-feature-3-nsf.webp?v=1771519700&width=3840)

![NSF Certified Icon](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/NSF-Certified.svg?v=1770311247&width=3840)

## NSF Certified for  Professional Athletes

**STEMREGEN® Sport** is rigorously tested and certified by NSF for Sport to ensure it contains no banned performance-enhancing compounds.

This provides athletes with confidence in WADA compliance while supporting the benefits of daily stem cell release and recovery support.

![Pterostilbene](https://www.stemregen.co/products/sport?selling_plan=10676633878)

### Pterostilbene

Shown to support muscle recovery and stem cell differentiation.

Pterostilbene is extracted from the bark of Pterocarpus marsupium. It is a powerful antioxidant that has been shown to support muscle recovery and stem cell differentiation.

Close

![SeaStem™](https://www.stemregen.co/products/sport?selling_plan=10676633878)

### SeaStem™

Increases the number of circulating stem cells by 35%

Harvested from the Tibetan Plateau, our SeaStem is a uniquely sourced extract of sea buckthorn berry, which contains a wealth of polyphenols and anthocyanidins that have been documented to support the release of stem cells from the bone marrow. The scientific name for sea buckthorn, Hippophae, is derived from the Greek words "hippo" (horse), and "phae" (light) and essentially means "shining horse". It comes from Alexander the Great after he witnessed the regenerative benefits of sea buckthorn on a herd of horses wounded in battle.

Close

![StemAloe®](https://www.stemregen.co/products/sport?selling_plan=10676633878)

### StemAloe®

Increases the number of circulating stem cells by 80%.

Extracted from a unique species of aloe coming from Madagascar, StemAloe is indigenously known as 'vahona' and has been used for centuries for a wide variety of health benefits. It has been documented to increase the number of circulating stem cells by an average of 80%.

Close

![StemAFA™](https://www.stemregen.co/products/sport?selling_plan=10676633878)

### StemAFA™

Increases the number of circulating stem cells by 25%

AFA is a blue-green algae growing naturally in Klamath Lake, Southern Oregon.  AFA extract has been documented to increase the number of circulating stem cells by 25%.  AFA is also been known for its effect on the immune system and for supporting mental energy and clarity.

Close

![Fucus Vesiculosus Extract](https://www.stemregen.co/products/sport?selling_plan=10676633878)

### Fucus Vesiculosus Extract

Documented to increase the number of circulating stem cells.

Fucus Vesiculosus Extract is a seaweed that has been used for centuries for its numerous health benefits, especially on the immune system. In addition to its effect on stem cells, the polyphenols (phlorotannins) and fucoidan in fucus have been associated with a broad variety of health benefits.

Close

![Panax Notoginseng Extract](https://www.stemregen.co/products/sport?selling_plan=10676633878)

### Panax Notoginseng Extract

Documented to increase the number of circulating stem cells and to provide a broad variety of health benefits.

Panax Notoginseng Extract has been associated with benefits to the cardiovascular and endocrine systems, and has been documented to significantly increase the number of circulating stem cells.

Close

![Beta-Glucan 1-3](https://www.stemregen.co/products/sport?selling_plan=10676633878)

### Beta-Glucan 1-3

Documented to support various aspects of stem cell function.

Beta-Glucan has been documented to support various aspects of stem cell function, including stem cell proliferation, release from the bone marrow, and migration into tissues. The Beta-Glucan used in Stemregen Release is is 85% (1→3)-b-D-glucose bonds, the most potent form of Beta-Glucan.

Close

![Background image for STEMREGEN Sport banner](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/hero-sport.webp?v=1770309800&width=3840)

![Stemregen Protocol Sport supplement bottles and packaging](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/protocol-sport-banner.webp?v=1771189140&width=3840)

SPORT **PROTOCOL**

A Comprehensive Protocol for Stem Cell Function

**STEMREGEN® Sport**, in combination with STEMREGEN® Signal and Mobilize form a comprehensive approach to tapping into the potential of stem cells. While SIGNAL fine-tunes the body’s cellular communication, ensuring stem cells circulate throughout the body, and Mobilize helps stem cells to seamlessly travel through blood vessels, resulting in efficient stem cell delivery, STEMREGEN® Sport boosts stem cell release and migration for optimal post-exercise recovery and vitality.

Each component of the system plays a distinct role, yet together this triad enhances the body’s natural ability to renew, helping athletes to achieve their optimal performance and recovery outcomes while staying within the bounds of sports integrity standards.

[Learn More](https://www.stemregen.co/pages/protocols)

**DISCLAIMER:** At STEMREGEN®, our mission is to educate on the potential of stem cells and their role as the body’s innate repair system. The information provided on this website—including articles, educational content, copy, video testimonials, and other materials—is intended solely for informational and educational purposes. Our claim is simple: STEMREGEN® supports the body’s natural repair system by increasing the number of circulating stem cells. We invite you to consider, “If you have more stem cells in circulation, what could happen?”

Our products are backed by scientific research, and we substantiate the increase in circulating stem cells through documented clinical trials and ongoing studies. We reference peer-reviewed articles and research to demonstrate the broader effects of stem cells in the body, highlighting outcomes that are grounded in science. Any research we present is based on clinical trials conducted by our company and/or independent laboratories, ensuring the credibility and validity of the results.

Please note that none of the content shared here is intended to make medical claims, diagnose, treat, or provide medical advice for any conditions. The personal stories and experiences shared are unique to the individuals and should not be interpreted as guarantees of specific outcomes. Always consult with a healthcare professional before beginning any new supplement or treatment. The statements on this site have not been evaluated by the FDA, and our products are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

metadata.twitter:title: STEMREGEN® Stem Cell Supplement - Sport – Stemregen
metadata.title: STEMREGEN® Stem Cell Supplement - Sport – Stemregen
metadata.og:description: STEMREGEN® Sport is formulated to boost the release of stem cells from the bone marrow, increasing their availability in the bloodstream. This surge in circulating stem cells supports muscle repair and recovery. The blend of pterostilbene and notoginseng in STEMREGEN® Sport enhances physical resilience and endurance, making it an ideal supplement for athletes. Recommended dosage is two capsules per day, and an additional two capsules after strenuous physical activity.
